fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the item batch.

fields.name: Item Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item filter that is used to select the items to be adjusted.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the cost adjustment process.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the cost adjustment process started.

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the cost adjustment process ended or was canceled.

fields.name: Timeout (Minutes)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of minutes that the cost adjustment process is allowed to run before it is canceled.

fields.name: Post to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the cost adjustment process should post the cost adjustment entries to the general ledger.

fields.name: Trace
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you want to trace the next cost adjustment run. It can be used to pinpoint issues in the cost adjustment process.

fields.name: Last Error
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last error that occurred during the cost adjustment process.

fields.name: Last Error Call Stack
fields.tooltip: Specifies the call stack of the last error that occurred during the cost adjustment process.

fields.name: Reschedule Count
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of times that the cost adjustment process is allowed to be retried if it fails.
